  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Hostel Administrator",
  "description": "Mudiame University is a privately-owned University in Irrua, Edo State, Nigeria. The institution has been officially accredited and/or recognized by the National Universities Commission (NUC), Nigeria, and is on a mission to contribute to the sustainable welfare of society with expertise in science, technology and business, and through teaching, research and community service.

Mudiame University has the vision to be a world-leading institution for technological innovation that addresses the challenges of agriculture and food safety, energy, health, manufacturing, oil and gas, security and transportation on a regional and global scale.

Applications are invited from suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Hostel Administrator

Job Location: Irrua, Edo

Requirements


	Good honours Degree &ndash; HND or BSc with a minimum of Second Class Lower Division in a relevant field from a recognized institution&nbsp;
	Possession of NYSC Discharge/Exemption/Exclusion Certificate.
	Registered/certified member of a relevant professional body with a practicing License.
	Possession of a higher degree will be of added advantage
	Computer Literacy is compulsory, except Artisans. Interviews will include Computer-Based Tests.
",

Hostel Administrator Job at Mudiame University




        
    

        
        Mudiame University is a privately-owned University in Irrua, Edo State, Nigeria. The institution has been officially accredited and/or recognized by the National Universities Commission (NUC), Nigeria, and is on a mission to contribute to the sustainable welfare of society with expertise in science, technology and business, and through teaching, research and community service.

Mudiame University has the vision to be a world-leading institution for technological innovation that addresses the challenges of agriculture and food safety, energy, health, manufacturing, oil and gas, security and transportation on a regional and global scale.

Applications are invited from suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:
     

            
    



Job Position: Hostel Administrator

Job Location: Irrua, Edo

Requirements


	Good honours Degree – HND or BSc with a minimum of Second Class Lower Division in a relevant field from a recognized institution 
	Possession of NYSC Discharge/Exemption/Exclusion Certificate.
	Registered/certified member of a relevant professional body with a practicing License.
	Possession of a higher degree will be of added advantage
	Computer Literacy is compulsory, except Artisans. Interviews will include Computer-Based Tests.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Chief Information Officer",
  "description": "Blossom Prince was established in 2007 under KC auto investment registered with CAC n Nigeria .Blossom deal on house keeping products, toiletries, car care products and gift item. We have reliable partner in countries like USA, Indonesia, Malaysia and China. With our partnership we bring customised quality products with affordable prices in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Chief Information Officer

Job Locations: Lagos, and Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilties


	Design and customize technological systems and platforms to improve customer experience
	Plan the implementation of new systems and provide guidance to IT professionals and other staff within the organization
	Approve purchases of technological equipment and software and establish partnerships with IT providers
	Oversee the technological infrastructure (networks and computer systems) in the organization to ensure optimal performance
	Direct and organize IT-related projects
	Monitor changes or advancements in technology to discover ways the company can gain competitive advantage.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor`s / Master`s Degree with 2 - 5 years of experience.


Salary
N200,000 - N350,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: blossomprincelimmited@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Chief Information Officer Job at Blossom Prince




        
    

        
        Blossom Prince was established in 2007 under KC auto investment registered with CAC n Nigeria .Blossom deal on house keeping products, toiletries, car care products and gift item. We have reliable partner in countries like USA, Indonesia, Malaysia and China. With our partnership we bring customised quality products with affordable prices in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Chief Information Officer

Job Locations: Lagos, and Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilties
     

            
    




	Design and customize technological systems and platforms to improve customer experience
	Plan the implementation of new systems and provide guidance to IT professionals and other staff within the organization
	Approve purchases of technological equipment and software and establish partnerships with IT providers
	Oversee the technological infrastructure (networks and computer systems) in the organization to ensure optimal performance
	Direct and organize IT-related projects
	Monitor changes or advancements in technology to discover ways the company can gain competitive advantage.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor`s / Master`s Degree with 2 - 5 years of experience.


Salary
N200,000 - N350,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Quality Control Officer",
  "description": "MartGlobal Limited is a leading manufacturing company dedicated to producing high quality packaging polytheneproducts that meet industry standards and customer requirements.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Quality Control Officer
Job Location: Iyana-Ipaja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Quality Control Officer will be responsible for monitoring production processes, inspecting raw materials and finished products, ensuring compliance with quality standards and supporting continuous improvement initiatives within the factory.


Responsibilities


	Conduct quality inspections on raw materials, in-process products and finished goods.
	Monitor production activities to ensure compliance with quality standards and specifications.
	Identify, document and report quality defects and non-conformities.
	Perform routine testing and measurements on products.
	Maintain accurate quality control records and reports.
	Collaborate with production teams to resolve quality-related issues.
	Ensure compliance with company quality policies and safety procedures.
	Participate in quality improvement and waste reduction initiatives.
	Recommend corrective and preventive actions where necessary.
	Inspect incoming raw materials and packaging materials for conformity to specifications.
	Conduct routine quality checks during production processes.
	Perform quality tests and measurements using approved methods and equipments.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a B.Sc Degree with 5 years of work experience.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: sule.e@martglobal.com.ng using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Quality Control Officer Job at MartGlobal Limited




        
    

        
        MartGlobal Limited is a leading manufacturing company dedicated to producing high quality packaging polytheneproducts that meet industry standards and customer requirements.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Quality Control Officer
Job Location: Iyana-Ipaja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Quality Control Officer will be responsible for monitoring production processes, inspecting raw materials and finished products, ensuring compliance with quality standards and supporting continuous improvement initiatives within the factory.


Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Conduct quality inspections on raw materials, in-process products and finished goods.
	Monitor production activities to ensure compliance with quality standards and specifications.
	Identify, document and report quality defects and non-conformities.
	Perform routine testing and measurements on products.
	Maintain accurate quality control records and reports.
	Collaborate with production teams to resolve quality-related issues.
	Ensure compliance with company quality policies and safety procedures.
	Participate in quality improvement and waste reduction initiatives.
	Recommend corrective and preventive actions where necessary.
	Inspect incoming raw materials and packaging materials for conformity to specifications.
	Conduct routine quality checks during production processes.
	Perform quality tests and measurements using approved methods and equipments.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a B.Sc Degree with 5 years of work experience.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 per month. 

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "HSE Supervisor",
  "description": "FMR Agency (officially known as Future Moves Recruitment Agency) is a licensed, full-fledged Human Resource and talent management firm based in Nigeria. FMR Agency specializes in human capital development, staffing, and corporate consulting.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HSE Supervisor

Job Location: Idu, Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking an experienced HSE Supervisor.
	The HSE Supervisor supports the Head of HSE in ensuring a safe, healthy, and compliant workplace.
	The role involves monitoring safety standards, conducting inspections, providing safety training, investigating incidents, maintaining HSE records, and ensuring compliance with company policies and relevant regulations.


Key Responsibilities


	Conduct routine safety inspections and monitor compliance with PPE and HSE requirements.
	Assist with HSE inductions, safety training, toolbox talks, and awareness programmes.
	Conduct pre-shift safety briefings and communicate workplace hazards and safety precautions.
	Monitor operational activities, identify unsafe acts or conditions, and implement corrective actions.
	Support incident reporting, investigations, and maintenance of the incident register.
	Inspect and maintain first aid facilities and support emergency preparedness activities.
	Maintain accurate HSE records, documentation, and compliance reports.
	?Compile and submit safety data, inspection findings, and incident reports to the Head of HSE.
	Promote a strong safety culture and ensure compliance with company policies and applicable HSE regulations.


Qualifications and Experience


	HND / B.Sc. Degree in Environmental Science, Engineering, Occupational Health &amp; Safety, or a related field.
	Minimum of 2&ndash;4 years of experience in an HSE role within manufacturing, construction, logistics, or industrial operations.
	Professional HSE certifications (HSE Levels 1&ndash;3, NEBOSH, IOSH, or equivalent).
	Sound knowledge of Nigerian HSE regulations and industry best practices.


Required Skills and Competencies:


	Strong knowledge of occupational health and safety principles.
	Excellent observation, reporting, and investigative skills.
	Good communication and training delivery abilities.
	Ability to identify hazards and implement corrective actions.
	Strong record-keeping and documentation skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications.
	Ability to work independently and maintain high ethical standards.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: hrbp4@fmragency.com using &quot;HSE Supervisor&quot; as the subject of the emai",

HSE Supervisor Job at FMR Agency




        
    

        
        FMR Agency (officially known as Future Moves Recruitment Agency) is a licensed, full-fledged Human Resource and talent management firm based in Nigeria. FMR Agency specializes in human capital development, staffing, and corporate consulting.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HSE Supervisor

Job Location: Idu, Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

            
    




	We are seeking an experienced HSE Supervisor.
	The HSE Supervisor supports the Head of HSE in ensuring a safe, healthy, and compliant workplace.
	The role involves monitoring safety standards, conducting inspections, providing safety training, investigating incidents, maintaining HSE records, and ensuring compliance with company policies and relevant regulations.


Key Responsibilities


	Conduct routine safety inspections and monitor compliance with PPE and HSE requirements.
	Assist with HSE inductions, safety training, toolbox talks, and awareness programmes.
	Conduct pre-shift safety briefings and communicate workplace hazards and safety precautions.
	Monitor operational activities, identify unsafe acts or conditions, and implement corrective actions.
	Support incident reporting, investigations, and maintenance of the incident register.
	Inspect and maintain first aid facilities and support emergency preparedness activities.
	Maintain accurate HSE records, documentation, and compliance reports.
	?Compile and submit safety data, inspection findings, and incident reports to the Head of HSE.
	Promote a strong safety culture and ensure compliance with company policies and applicable HSE regulations.


Qualifications and Experience


	HND / B.Sc. Degree in Environmental Science, Engineering, Occupational Health & Safety, or a related field.
	Minimum of 2–4 years of experience in an HSE role within manufacturing, construction, logistics, or industrial operations.
	Professional HSE certifications (HSE Levels 1–3, NEBOSH, IOSH, or equivalent).
	Sound knowledge of Nigerian HSE regulations and industry best practices.


Required Skills and Competencies:


	Strong knowledge of occupational health and safety principles.
	Excellent observation, reporting, and investigative skills.
	Good communication and training delivery abilities.
	Ability to identify hazards and implement corrective actions.
	Strong record-keeping and documentation skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications.
	Ability to work independently and maintain high ethical standards.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "HSE Supervisor" as the subject of the emai    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Social Media Manager Job at Just Recruitment Agency
content:
Just Recruitment Agency - Our client is a growing financial services organization committed to delivering innovative solutions and exceptional customer experiences. Our focus is on leveraging technology, creativity, and strategic thinking to drive business growth and build lasting relationships with our clients.

They are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager

Job Location: Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time
Working Hours: Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM

Job Summary
     

            
    




	We are seeking a creative, proactive, and results-driven Social Media Manager to strengthen our digital presence and support our brand objectives.
	The Social Media Manager will be responsible for developing, implementing, and managing the company's social media strategy to increase brand awareness, engage target audiences, and drive business growth.
	The ideal candidate should be highly creative, capable of creating compelling digital content with minimal supervision, and committed to building a long-term career with the organization.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and execute social media strategies aligned with the company's business goals.
	Create, schedule, and publish engaging content across various social media platforms.
	Design and manage digital campaigns to improve brand visibility and audience engagement.
	Monitor social media trends and recommend innovative content ideas.
	Manage the company's social media accounts and ensure consistent brand messaging.
	Respond to comments, messages, and inquiries in a professional and timely manner.
	Track, analyze, and report on social media performance metrics.
	Collaborate with internal teams to support marketing and promotional activities.
	Conduct market and competitor research to identify growth opportunities.
	Build and maintain an active online community around the company's brand.
	Take initiative in identifying and implementing strategies that improve online engagement and lead generation.


Requirements


	HND or Bachelor's Degree in Marketing, Mass Communication, Business Administration, Public Relations, or a related field.
	Minimum of 2 years of experience in social media management is preferred.
	Strong knowledge of major social media platforms and digital marketing trends.
	Proven ability to create engaging digital content with little or no supervision.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	Creative, proactive, and highly organized.
	Ability to work independently and take initiative.
	Basic knowledge of graphic design and content creation tools is an added advantage.
	Strong commitment to long-term employment and professional growth within the organization.


Salary


	Candidates with little or no experience: N105,000 monthly.
	Candidates with 2+ years of relevant experience: N120,000 monthly.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their aplications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: For more information, Whatsapp: 08073393652.    

    

        Click here to Apply
